message:
feat(core): add sys_fchmodat2 raw syscall + SYS_FCHMODAT2 constants

Plumb the raw fchmodat2 syscall through frankenlibc-core so the
unistd_abi shim added in 0c61ad9d can stop bouncing through
libc::syscall and instead call the project's own raw syscall path
(matching how every other "modern Linux syscall" wrapper in this
repo lands).

Additions:

- SYS_FCHMODAT2 = 452 added under both #[cfg(target_arch = "x86_64")]
  and #[cfg(target_arch = "aarch64")]. The syscall number is the
  same on both arches, like the openat2/clone3/faccessat2 batch.
- pub unsafe fn sys_fchmodat2(dirfd, pathname, mode, flags)
  -> Result<(), i32> forwarding to raw::syscall4 with the standard
  syscall_result(ret).map(|_| ()) conversion. Returns Ok(()) on
  success, Err(errno) on failure — matching the existing
  sys_fchmodat / sys_fchownat shape.
- SAFETY contract on the wrapper documents that pathname must be a
  valid NUL-terminated string — that is the kernel's only
  precondition.

The companion libc-side ABI export (faccessat2 + the runtime_policy
gate) lands in the next commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
